mapper.sql: id, student_id, document_type, document_name, file_url, file_size, mime_type, review_status, remark, deleted, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO student_document (student_id, document_type, document_name, file_url, file_size, mime_type, review_status, remark) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{documentType}, #{documentName}, #{fileUrl}, #{fileSize}, #{mimeType}, #{reviewStatus}, #{remark})
mapper.update:
UPDATE student_document
document_type = #{documentType}, document_name = #{documentName}, file_url = #{fileUrl}, file_size = #{fileSize}, mime_type = #{mimeType}, review_status = #{reviewStatus}, remark = #{remark}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE student_document SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT FROM student_document WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC, id DESC
SELECT FROM student_document WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
